_doc: Phase 5 Plan 05-06 — restrained-mode activation canary. Simulates a chatty over-ask Sonnet emitting 3 ambiguous-circuit ask_user calls within a rolling 5-turn window (turns 1, 2, 3). The 3rd ask MUST activate restrained mode (STA-05 'any rolling 5-turn window'). The 4th ask at turn 4 MUST short-circuit with answer_outcome='restrained_mode' and NOT consume budget (Pitfall 4). Per Plan 05-06 design: this fixture is SMOKE-ONLY (gate_fixture:false) — including it in the aggregate threshold gate would break restrained_rate ≤ 2% with N=12 (1/12 = 8.3%). Smoke mode asserts the activation, the short-circuit, and the outcome distribution.
_requirement: STA-05 + STT-08 — locks the rolling-window state machine end-to-end through the gate wrapper. STB-04 — budget NOT incremented on the restrained-mode short-circuit (Pitfall 4 carry-over).
transcript_summary: 7-turn over-ask scenario where Sonnet asks 'which circuit?' three times across turns 1-3, then attempts a 4th ask at turn 4 which must be short-circuited.

input.question: Which circuit was that R1+R2 for?
Which circuit was insulation resistance for?
